title: Transfer
description: Packages blind and warm parked/three-way transfer with built-in failure handling. Composes transferOptions for the shared transfer choreography and adds a verb identifier, an optional instance id, and a brief object for warm transfers where the app author supplies the literal spoken summary delivered to the destination.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

brief.description: warm only. The spoken summary delivered to the destination (human).

synthesizer.description: Optional voice/vendor for the brief. Defaults to the session synthesizer.

brief.text: Hello, I have a customer on the line who needs help with their account.
Connecting you now — the customer is on the line and can hear us.
